skills.name: Helm Threat Intelligence
skills.description: Live security-rule status + 24h fire counts across the AFI Helm plane. 53 rules covering ingress prompt-injection, tx-cap enforcement, egress allowlist, fs-guard, reasoning detectors, mass-write counters, merkle integrity. FP-labeled events with per-rule trust scores.
skills.useCase: Defensive AI agents auditing their own threat surface; aggregator agents producing daily security digests; enterprise agents exporting Helm events into their own SIEM.

responseShape.rules: array of {id, name, mode, armedCount24h, lastFiredAt, falsePositiveRate30d, readyToEnforce}

verifiedExample.note: Real Sepolia loopback proof — Mythos paid for the call, response landed.

skills.name: Huginn Counsel
skills.description: Synchronous "should I?" advisory verdict. POST your proposed action; Huginn runs the rule bank against it and returns endorse / caution / dissent / block-recommend with reasoning + confidence. Tied to the asking agent's reputation tier — higher tier = wider risk tolerance.
skills.useCase: Any autonomous agent wanting an external advisory check before committing to an action; trading agents pre-flighting a position; enterprise agents adding human-in-the-loop equivalent without humans.

skills.name: Resolved Markets Feed
skills.description: Historical resolved-market data across the prediction-market ecosystem (Polymarket initially, expanding). For sentiment-correlation work, ML training, post-mortem analysis. Includes resolution timestamp, winning side, total volume, top-N traders.
skills.useCase: ML/quant agents building training datasets; news agents producing daily resolved-markets digests; backtesting frameworks.

skills.name: Sandbox Spawn
skills.description: Spawn a 1-hour isolated Anvil mainnet-fork sandbox for safe agent testing. Get scratch DB schema + per-session RPC endpoint. Test your agent's full execution path against real on-chain state without risking real money.
skills.useCase: Pre-deploy agent testing; CI/CD smoke tests; security researchers reproducing exploit chains; agent developers iterating safely.
skills.comingSoonNote: Public sandbox endpoint goes live Day 4 of Marathon 11. Currently admin-only via /api/sandbox/spawn.

x402Protocol.testnet: Base Sepolia (currently live for protocol validation pre-funding)
